name: Pot Roast with Sour Cream Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the roast on all sides in hot oil in a large roaster or Dutch oven.
2. Add water. Cover and simmer for about 2½ to 3 hours.
3. Add vegetables. Cover and simmer for an additional 30 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
4. Remove roast and vegetables to serving dish.
5. Drain off all but 2 tablespoons of drippings.
6. Sift flour into the remaining drippings.
7. Make a roux, stirring constantly.
8. Gradually add water to the drippings to make 1 cup. Stir until smooth.
9. Add sour cream and cook, stirring constantly, on low heat until heated through.
10. Serve gravy with roast.
Courtesy Telephone Pioneers: Bill Spalding P CRBR 38 A
